$schema: The eight named 2027 frontier seams from the brief (S3). Each is an old primitive landing on a node-pair that was not a trust bridge ~24 months ago. Each compresses sub-seams; the decomposition lives in seams.json as entries whose `parent` equals the frontier id here. The gap engine and validate.ts require every frontier seam to decompose into >=2 sub-seams.

frontier_seams.name: Semantic Data->Control
frontier_seams.summary: The LLM is a parser with no grammar; any text is potential control. The seam now exists at every text-ingress: retrieval, tool output, memory, file, fetch. Moved from 'where there is a query language' to 'where there is text'.
frontier_seams.edge: {Doc, Web, Email, Tool-output, Memory} -> AI Agent

frontier_seams.name: Authority-at-Machine-Speed
frontier_seams.summary: The deputy used to be a human with judgment and human pace; now it is an agent with the human's scope, zero judgment, machine speed. OAuth/IAM/rate-limits were calibrated to human behavior; the agent voids the calibration. Same stolen token, inverted blast radius.

frontier_seams.name: Tool-Broker Confused Deputy
frontier_seams.summary: MCP/tool brokers hold creds to N backends and select tools from model output: confused deputy by construction. Plus cross-server contamination. 4-party hyperedge where no single party sees the whole frame.

frontier_seams.name: Retrieval-Time Provenance Collapse
frontier_seams.summary: RAG ingests from open sources (untrusted write) and injects at query time into privileged context (trusted read). Write-side open, read-side privileged, no boundary check between them.

frontier_seams.name: Memory-as-Dead-Drop
frontier_seams.summary: Agent long-term memory is written under injection influence and re-read as trusted context every session: write-once, trigger-many, cross-session. The agent polls its own state, so memory is a C2 channel with no external leg and no framework.

frontier_seams.name: Inter-Agent Trust
frontier_seams.summary: Orchestrator->worker and agent-to-agent treat peer output as authoritative tasking, but peer output is model output (P1-manipulable). Lateral across an agent mesh needs no exploit: just convince one agent to instruct the next. Machines social-engineering machines.

frontier_seams.name: Detection-Model Seam
frontier_seams.summary: As the SOC deploys ML/LLM detection, the detector is a parser with a Data->Control seam: evade it, poison its training, prompt-inject the AI analyst's incident summary. Offense gap = wherever defense automated faster than it hardened.

frontier_seams.name: Capability-Composition
frontier_seams.summary: Skills, plugins, containers compose at runtime, each inheriting host authority. Composition unions authority but not scrutiny: as exposed as the least-vetted component, as trusting as the most-vetted.
